summary.zh: 比较合成友好属性、硬件加速提示与布局触发属性的渲染成本。
summary.en: Compare compositor-friendly properties, hardware-acceleration hints, and layout-triggering properties.

definition.zh: 让 GPU 在独立图层上移动元素或改变其透明度，无需重新执行布局或绘制。
definition.en: Compositing assembles painted layers into the final frame and can update transforms or opacity without repeating layout.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 比较合成友好属性与触发布局或绘制的属性，选择稳定的渲染路径。
purpose.en: Compare compositor-friendly properties with layout- or paint-triggering properties to choose a stable rendering path.

frequency.zh: 在新动效实现、性能回归和复杂页面集成时检查。
frequency.en: Review during new motion implementation, performance regressions, and integration into complex pages.

trigger.zh: 由属性选择或性能实验触发，同时记录主线程、布局、绘制和合成活动。
trigger.en: Trigger from property selection or a performance experiment while recording main-thread, layout, paint, and compositing activity.

enterExit.zh: 实验对象直接切换属性方案，指标变化保持可读，避免附加过渡污染结果。
enterExit.en: Switch property strategies directly and keep metric changes readable without extra transitions affecting results.

interruptibility.zh: 测试可中断并重置图层状态，will-change 只在需要前短暂启用。
interruptibility.en: Allow tests to stop and reset layer state, enabling will-change only shortly before it is needed.

gestureRules.zh: 手势测试按同样距离和速度驱动两种方案，确保比较公平。
gestureRules.en: Drive compared strategies with identical gesture distance and speed.

reducedMotion.zh: 低动态模式仍优先 transform 和 opacity，并减少持续图层占用。
reducedMotion.en: Reduced-motion mode still favors transform and opacity while limiting persistent layer allocation.

reviewNotes.zh: 区分 Compositing、will-change 与 Layout thrashing。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish Compositing, will-change, and Layout thrashing.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查图层数量、内存和完成后的清理。
reviewNotes.en: Inspect layer count, memory use, and cleanup after completion.
